answers.text: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-compressor-evidence-gap-partial-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","requires_confirmation":true,"answers":[{"summary":"当前围绕选中的 Recycle Compressor（compressor-1）生成候选编辑提案。诊断指出出口压力目标（235 kPa）与进口压力（220 kPa）之间的压比过小（约 1.07），不足以解释所需的压缩负荷；同时根因尚未确认——可能是压力目标设
